subject: Gaming
title: The Activision Blizzard Lawsuit
description: A short lesson to help you apply The Activision Blizzard Lawsuit.

hook.text: California sued Activision Blizzard for a 'frat boy' culture of harassment. The industry's biggest scandal erupted.

buildup.text: In 2021, a two-year state investigation revealed widespread sexual harassment and discrimination.

discovery.text: Women described being groped, paid less, and passed over for promotions. The allegations were systematic.

twist.text: CEO Bobby Kotick allegedly knew about the problems for years. Employees staged a walkout demanding change.

climax.text: The scandal accelerated unionization across the industry. Workers organized to demand safer workplaces.

punchline.text: A two-year investigation. A walkout. An industry forced to confront itself.

quiz.question: What broader change did the Activision Blizzard scandal accelerate?
options: Unionization efforts across the gaming industry
